title: Gravel Unbound Simulation
description: Variable power with surges simulating gravel racing
purpose: Simulate unpredictable nature of gravel racing

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 27:00 at 65%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 75%, 85-100 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27 minutes of Z2 work. 85-100 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 21:36. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 54% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 130% FTP × 1:48. After rest, expect 80% for 10min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 54% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 54% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. 130% for 1:48. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 80% for 10:48. Then 28min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3. 23min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 56% done. 1 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 56% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3. 1 to go. 28 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 4/4.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 140-140% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 27 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 140-140% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 70% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% through. This is your workout. Own it. 50% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
